'''tamudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogasm|yogasm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogasm|yogasm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tamudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmidhith|tæmidhith]] || [[word:tæmidhij|tæmidhij]] || [[word:tæmidhish|tæmidhish]] || [[word:tæmidhi|tæmidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamumudhuth|tamumudhuth]] || [[word:tamumudhuj|tamumudhuj]] || [[word:tamumudhush|tamumudhush]] || [[word:tamumudhu|tamumudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamudhuth|tamudhuth]] || [[word:tamudhuj|tamudhuj]] || [[word:tamudhush|tamudhush]] || [[word:tamudhu|tamudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamufdhuth|tamufdhuth]] || [[word:tamufdhuj|tamufdhuj]] || [[word:tamufdhush|tamufdhush]] || [[word:tamufdhuf|tamufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamudhuthu|tamudhuthu]] || [[word:tamudhuju|tamudhuju]] || [[word:tamudhushu|tamudhushu]] || [[word:tamudhuku|tamudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamudhuth|tamudhuth]] || [[word:tamudhuj|tamudhuj]] || [[word:tamudhush|tamudhush]] || [[word:tamudhu|tamudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamudhuthul|tamudhuthul]] || [[word:tamudhujul|tamudhujul]] || [[word:tamudhushul|tamudhushul]] || [[word:tamudhukul|tamudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamudhuthuthu|tamudhuthuthu]] || [[word:tamudhujuju|tamudhujuju]] || [[word:tamudhushushu|tamudhushushu]] || [[word:tamudhuku|tamudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamudhuthun|tamudhuthun]] || [[word:tamudhujun|tamudhujun]] || [[word:tamudhushun|tamudhushun]] || [[word:tamudhukun|tamudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamudhuthuoro|tamudhuthuoro]] || [[word:tamudhujuoro|tamudhujuoro]] || [[word:tamudhushuoro|tamudhushuoro]] || [[word:tamudhukuoro|tamudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
